Enable CORS for cross-origin requests from our web applications. Set up cluster discovery and node communication. This is for our production search infrastructure.

http.cors.enabled: true
http.cors.allow-origin: "*"
discovery.seed_hosts: ["es-node1.example.com", "es-node2.example.com", "es-node3.example.com"]
cluster.initial_master_nodes: ["es-node1.example.com"]
